text: Species            Duration            Dose            Decreased plasma volume?            Increased blood viscosity?            Summary            Citation                  Rainbow trout (Salmo gairdneri)            3 days            Low pH (4.0-4.5)            yes            yes            Adult trout showed statistically significant decreased plasma volume leading to increased blood viscosity.            Milligan and Wood (1982)                  Rainbow trout (Oncorhynchus mykiss)            24 hours            4.9 umol/L copper            yes            yes            Adult trout showed decreased plasma volume inferred from  statistically significant increased plasma protein concentrations leading to increased blood viscosity inferred from statistically significant increased hematocrit.            Wilson and Taylor (1993)
